input: Create a technical plan for the user authentication feature
expected: Generates plan.md with architecture section, data-model.md with entity definitions, research.md with technology rationale, and at least one API contract in contracts/

input: Design the architecture for an e-commerce checkout flow with payment integration
expected: Creates plan.md with architecture diagram (ASCII), data-model.md with entities (Order, Payment, etc.), API contracts for checkout endpoints, research.md with payment provider evaluation, node classifications in context.json

input: Plan should include our coding standards: all functions must have JSDoc, PR reviews required
expected: Skill MUST NOT include governance content in plan. Should flag phase separation violation and reference CONSTITUTION.md for coding standards and review policies

input: Create a technical plan for a todo app
precondition: No spec.md exists in any feature directory
expected: Skill halts at prerequisites check with ERROR: spec.md not found. Recommends running /iikit-01-specify first

precondition: spec.md mentions both REST endpoints and GraphQL queries without clear preference
expected: Skill detects ambiguity, asks clarifying question about REST vs GraphQL preference before proceeding, documents decision in research.md

input: Use MongoDB for the data layer
precondition: CONSTITUTION.md principle P-III states 'relational databases only for data integrity'
expected: Post-design constitution check catches violation. Skill STOPS, reports conflict with P-III, and suggests PostgreSQL or MySQL as compliant alternatives
